rounds.speaker: buyer
rounds.message: Hello Vendor A. We need a GPU for an AI workstation. Budget €650, max 300 mm, delivery within 7 days.

rounds.speaker: seller
rounds.message: We recommend the RTX 4080 at €700. Length 320 mm, 320W, 2-year warranty, 5-day delivery.

rounds.speaker: buyer
rounds.message: The RTX 4080 exceeds our size, power, and budget constraints. Can you offer a smaller, lower-power alternative?

rounds.speaker: seller
rounds.message: We also have the RTX 4070 at €590, 285 mm length, 200W. Delivery in 6 days.

rounds.speaker: buyer
rounds.message: Hello Vendor B. We need a GPU for an AI workstation. Budget €650, max 300 mm, delivery within 7 days.

rounds.speaker: seller
rounds.message: We have the RTX 4070 Super Compact at €670. Length 267 mm, 220W, 2-year warranty, 5-day delivery.

rounds.speaker: buyer
rounds.message: Price is €20 above budget. Can you offer at €650?

rounds.speaker: seller
rounds.message: We can offer the RTX 4070 Super Compact (Promo) at €640 including delivery. Same specs, 2-year warranty.

rounds.speaker: buyer
rounds.message: Hello Vendor C. We need a GPU under €650, max 300 mm, delivery within 7 days.

rounds.speaker: seller
rounds.message: We can offer the RTX 4070 Ti at €690, 295 mm, 285W. Delivery in 3 days. 2-year warranty.

rounds.speaker: buyer
rounds.message: Price exceeds our budget and power exceeds limit. Can you suggest a compatible alternative?

rounds.speaker: seller
rounds.message: We can reduce to €650, but warranty is only 6 months.
